items.title: Coherence differential imaging using gradient-boosted decision trees for the direct detection of exoplanets
items.abstract: Coronagraphic imaging of exoplanets is limited by residual speckles that mimic planets. Advanced post-processing is essential for current and future instruments on the ground or in space. Current techniques are time-intensive and limited. ADI requires long sequences and is limited at small separations. RDI is also time-consuming and sensitive to speckle evolution, leading to imperfect subtraction. Coherence Differential Imaging (CDI), which we successfully demonstrated on SPHERE, offers a faster alternative by using the light incoherence between speckles and planets. However, its reliance on accurate instrumental models limits its performance. In this work, we introduce EPICX, an enhanced CDI method using gradient-boosted decision trees. EPICX models the differential signal as a high-dimensional regression problem, optimizing the discrimination between coherent speckle noise and incoherent planet signal. We validate this enhanced CDI method using simulated data for different coronagraphs, including those aboard JWST and Roman.
items.llm_evidence_en: improves exoplanet direct detection for atmospheric characterization
items.llm_evidence_cn: 改进系外行星直接成像以辅助大气表征
items.llm_evidence: 改进系外行星直接成像以辅助大气表征
items.canonical_evidence: 改进系外行星直接成像以辅助大气表征
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes EPICX, an enhanced Coherence Differential Imaging method using gradient-boosted decision trees, for direct exoplanet detection, overcoming speckle limitation.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 该工作针对系外行星直接成像中散斑噪声限制问题，提出EPICX方法，利用梯度提升决策树增强相干差分成像（CDI）。该方法减少了对精确仪器模型的依赖，有望提升直接检测能力，为后续大气表征提供更清晰的目标。
